zh.lifeSummary: 當Katheryn Hayward於1460年出生在英國史洛普爾布洛可頓時，她的父親William Hayward15歲，母親Agnes Bailey16歲。她和Thomas Wallis至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1510年在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katheryn Hayward于1460年出生在英国史洛普爾布洛可頓时，她的父亲William Hayward15岁，母亲Agnes Bailey16岁。她和Thomas Wallis至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1510年在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hayward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Hayworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Heyworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: Katheryn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Katherine , influenced by the productive name suffix -yn.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katheryn Hayward was born in 1460, in Brockton, Shropshire, England, her father, William Hayward, was 15 and her mother, Agnes Bailey, was 16. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas Wallis. She died about 1510, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katheryn Hayward est née en 1460, à Brockton, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Hayward, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Agnes Bailey, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas Wallis. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katheryn Hayward 1460 in Brockton, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Hayward 15 und ihre Mutter Agnes Bailey 16. Sie hatte mit Thomas Wallis mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Cossington, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katheryn Hayward è nata il nel 1460 nel Brockton, Shropshire, England, sua padre, William Hayward, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Agnes Bailey, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas Wallis. Morì circa 1510, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katheryn Hayward(이)가 1460년 영국 슈럽실르 브록턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hayward(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Bailey(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Wallis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katheryn Hayward родилась в 1460 г. в местности брокктон, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Hayward было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bailey, 16. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas Wallis. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
